title: BEM-624 architecture reconcile
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

# Scan architecture/planning files without assuming exact names.
patterns=['*MASTER*171*','*master*171*','*PROMPT*171*','*prompt*171*','*HANDOFF*','*WRITE_CHANNEL*','*ARCHITECTURE*','*architecture*','*INTERNAL*CONTOUR*','*ROLE*','*MAILBOX*','*AUDIT*']
files=[]
for pat in patterns:
    for p in Path('.').rglob(pat):
        if '.git' in p.parts or p.is_dir():
            continue
        s=str(p)
        if s not in files:
            files.append(s)
files=sorted(files)[:250]

def read(path,limit=3000):
    p=Path(path)
    try:
        return p.read_text(errors='ignore')[:limit]
    except:
        return ''

snippets=[]
keywords=['curator','analyst','auditor','executor','mailbox','role_orchestrator','internal_contour','Claude','claude','provider','Deno','codex','MASTER PROMPT','171','registrar']
for f in files:
    txt=read(f,2000)
    score=sum(1 for k in keywords if k in txt or k in f)
    if score:
        snippets.append({'path':f,'score':score,'snippet':txt[:1000]})

# Actual artifacts from BEM-605..621.
actual_paths={
 'curator_inbox':'governance/curator/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'role_orchestrator':'governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'internal_task':'governance/internal_contour/tasks/bem605_hourly_report_canon_template.json',
 'analyst_plan':'governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans/bem605_hourly_report_template_plan.json',
 'internal_auditor_inbox':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox/bem605_hourly_report_template_claude_audit.json',
 'wrong_mailbox_to_claude':'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem605_hourly_report_template_review_request.md',
 'provider_route':'governance/provider_gates/bem610_provider_route_decision.json',
 'reserve_audit':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem612_reserve_audit_hourly_report_template.json',
 'executor_item':'governance/internal_contour/executor/inbox/bem612_execute_hourly_report_canon.json'
}
actual={k:{'path':v,'exists':Path(v).exists(),'size':Path(v).stat().st_size if Path(v).exists() else 0} for k,v in actual_paths.items()}

gaps=[
 {'id':'G1','title':'Mailbox used as internal role communication','expected':'Internal roles communicate through role_orchestrator/internal_contour inboxes; audit_mailbox is only for external<->internal auditor sync.','actual':'BEM-605 sent analyst->Claude auditor request through governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude.','severity':'high','fix':'Create internal role-bus canon, move/duplicate BEM-605 audit request into internal_contour/auditor/inbox, mark mailbox copy as external-audit-copy only, and add validator.'},
 {'id':'G2','title':'External auditor link missing in chain','expected':'External auditor and internal auditor coordinate through audit_mailbox; operator is not relay.','actual':'Only GPT->Claude mailbox was created; no explicit internal_auditor<->external_auditor decision thread was modeled.','severity':'high','fix':'Create external_internal_audit_sync package and route only auditor-to-auditor messages via audit_mailbox.'},
 {'id':'G3','title':'Claude primary provider proof incomplete','expected':'Before fallback, system checks Claude runtime/limits and records proof.','actual':'Provider gate recorded primary not proven and selected GPT reserve; no Claude-authored runtime artifact.','severity':'high','fix':'Add Claude runtime proof contract: primary cannot be selected without Claude-authored artifact; otherwise automatic reserve with reason.'},
 {'id':'G4','title':'Deno role confusion','expected':'Deno is external GPT write transport, not internal executor role. Internal executor should be Codex/direct repo write when available.','actual':'All repo writes from this ChatGPT session used Deno /codex-task because that is the available write channel here.','severity':'medium','fix':'Document Deno as external transport adapter only; introduce execution_adapter field distinguishing deno_transport from internal executor.'},
 {'id':'G5','title':'Live Telegram delivery not proven','expected':'Hourly report delivery state should say sent.','actual':'BEM-621 did not confirm sent.','severity':'medium','fix':'Keep delivery blocker until live state confirms sent and add delivery verifier.'}
]

report_obj={'schema_version':'architecture_reconciliation.v1','bem':'BEM-624','status':'gaps_found','scanned_files':files,'relevant_snippets':snippets[:40],'actual_artifacts':actual,'gaps':gaps,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:05 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem624_architecture_reconciliation_internal_contour.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(report_obj,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

md=['# BEM-624 | Architecture Reconciliation | Internal Contour','','Дата: 2026-05-18 | 07:05 (UTC+3)','','## Verdict','Current BEM-605..621 run used internal file artifacts, but violated the intended communication separation: audit_mailbox was used where internal role-bus should be primary. Claude primary runtime was not proven, so reserve path was correct but must be represented clearly.','','## Actual artifacts']
for k,v in actual.items():
    md.append('- '+k+': '+('exists' if v['exists'] else 'missing')+' | '+v['path'])
md.append('')
md.append('## Gaps')
for g in gaps:
    md.append('### '+g['id']+' | '+g['title'])
    md.append('- Expected: '+g['expected'])
    md.append('- Actual: '+g['actual'])
    md.append('- Severity: '+g['severity'])
    md.append('- Fix: '+g['fix'])
    md.append('')
md.append('## Scanned files')
for f in files[:80]:
    md.append('- '+f)
report=reports/'bem624_architecture_reconciliation_internal_contour.md'
report.write_text(sep.join(md)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem624_architecture_reconciliation_internal_contour','cycle_id':'bem624-architecture-reconciliation-internal-contour','source':'gpt_auditor','status':'gaps_found','gaps':[g['id'] for g in gaps],'report':str(report),'state_file':str(state_file),'blocker':{'code':'ARCHITECTURE_GAPS_FOUND','gaps':[g['id'] for g in gaps]},'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 07:05 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        contour_state={}
contour_state['bem624_architecture_reconciliation_internal_contour']={'status':'gaps_found','report':str(report),'state_file':str(state_file),'gaps':[g['id'] for g in gaps]}
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 07:05 (UTC+3)'
contour_state['blocker']={'code':'ARCHITECTURE_GAPS_FOUND','gaps':[g['id'] for g in gaps]}
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem624_architecture_reconciliation_internal_contour.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-624: architecture reconciliation completed; gaps found: '+','.join([g['id'] for g in gaps])+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Reconciled actual internal contour work against intended architecture and identified role communication/provider gaps')
"""
